summary: Iteration 2: Full backend (pytest 16/16 PASS incl. new pending_only filter) + frontend Playwright e2e of consumer site (/, /plan, /plan/:id) and admin (/admin). Verified: landing hero+services+CTAs, 4-step wizard, plan submission ⇒ awaiting_approval banner ⇒ admin pending queue ⇒ HITL approve ⇒ consumer banner auto-updates to 'Confirmed' (BOOKED); decline ⇒ DECLINED + consumer failure block; admin refuse path via prompt-chip-5 ⇒ REFUSED; back-to-consumer link works.

minor.issue: Still does not 409 when plan is no longer awaiting_approval (idempotent no-op via LangGraph) — pre-existing from iteration 1, not in this iteration's scope.

issues: Tailwind `capitalize` class title-cases every word so headline reads 'A Wedding In Bangalore' (not 'A wedding in Bangalore' as specified in the review request). Cosmetic — switch to `first-letter:uppercase` on a normal-case heading or capitalize only event_type/city values explicitly if exact-case is required.
For 130-guest wedding @ ₹6L bucket the AI plan totals ~₹6.6L (110% of budget) and the bar fills red. Functional, but consider showing an explicit 'over budget by ₹61,500' chip for clarity.
React validateDOMNesting warning persists — nested <button> inside history row. Cosmetic/a11y, carried over from iteration 1.

action_items: (Optional) Fix headline casing in /app/frontend/src/pages/PlanView.js Headline() — replace `capitalize` on the <h1> with explicit capitalisation of the first letter only, or apply text-transform only to `{r.event_type}` and `{r.city}` substrings.
(Optional carryover) Refactor nested <button> in admin History component to eliminate React DOM-nesting warning.
(Optional carryover) Add 409 short-circuit on /api/plans/{id}/decision when plan is not in awaiting_approval state.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py list_plans: pending_only filter is correctly indexed on 'state.status'; works as expected. Consider adding a Mongo index on state.status if traffic grows.
PlanView polls every 5s while awaiting_approval but never stops on unmount edge-cases if status updates exactly at unmount — handled fine via cleanup, looks correct.

Wizard.buildPrompt uses bucket.value (130 guests, ₹6L for the 8L bucket) — but the bucket id label says '₹3–8 lakh'. The prompt sent is realistic; just note the bucket label vs value mismatch can surprise users.

Wizard sends prompt to /api/plans synchronously and waits up to LLM latency (~30–45s) with only a 'Planning your event…' spinner. No client-side timeout/cancel — consider AbortController + friendlier error if backend stalls.
seed_data_creation: Created 3 new plans via wizard (1 booked, 1 declined, 1 refused) + reused plans from iteration 1. Pending plans created during pending_only test remain awaiting_approval in DB (visible in admin pending queue).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py — run with `pytest backend/tests/backend_test.py -v`. Order matters (TestPlanFlow.test_create_plan_hitl seeds _state['hitl_plan_id'] used by approve test); LangGraph in-memory checkpointer means backend must not restart between create and decision calls. UI testids documented: landing-root, hero-title, hero-plan-cta, services-section, service-{0..3}, cta-plan-button, consumer-nav, nav-plan-cta, wizard-root/back/next/submit, event-*, guests-*, city-*, event-date, budget-*, setting-*, prefs-notes, plan-content, status-banner, plan-headline, vendor-list, vendor-{0..4}, plan-timeline, budget-summary, next-steps, share-button, contact-button, plan-failure, admin-root, admin-nav, back-to-consumer, pending-queue, pending-row-N, hitl-modal, hitl-approve-button, hitl-decline-button, status-pill, prompt-chip-{0..5}, submit-plan-button, failure-card.
